stem: A public health study surveys 30 residents surveyed and observes 3 positive outcomes out of 30 (10.0%). Estimate the true vaccination coverage and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.1. Wilson 95% CI: [0.0346, 0.2562]. Point estimate: 0.1454.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
Not recognizing that with n=30, the normal approximation may be poor
